query: multiple exposure layered scenes blended frames analog film
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: multiple exposure layered scenes

response.objective_caption: A black and white macro photograph of a strip of photographic film with perforated edges extending diagonally across a dark reflective surface. One of the film frames shows a street scene with multi-story buildings and trees. The film strip is sharply focused along its leading edge while receding softly toward the upper and lower edges of the image. A photographer's watermark reading "© IreneM.dpch" appears at the center of the frame.
